achievements.title: Welcome Back to LV-426
achievements.description: Complete Stage 1 - Living Quarters by reaching the M577 APC
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: It Was Supposed to Be Hadley's Hope...
achievements.description: Without taking any damage, defeat the final boss of Stage 1 - Living Quarters
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: We're Not on Gateway Station Anymore
achievements.description: Without taking any damage, complete Stage 1 - Living Quarters
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Ripley's Blonde Now?
achievements.description: On a 1 Credit Run, defeat the final boss of Stage 1 - Living Quarters
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Only an Aeroplane Towing Vehicle After All
achievements.description: Without taking any damage, complete the first APC driving level
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Ripley, You've Blown the Transaxle! You're Just Grinding Metal!
achievements.description: On a 1 Credit Run, complete the first APC driving level
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: We're on an Express Elevator to Hell, Going Down!
achievements.description: Without dying, complete the elevator segment of Stage 2 - Factory
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: I've Got a Bad Feeling About This Drop
achievements.description: On a 1 Credit Run and without dying, complete the elevator segment of Stage 2 - Factory
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Whatever You're Gonna Do, Do It Fast!
achievements.description: With all three cables still intact, complete the elevator segment of Stage 2 - Factory
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Another Glorious Day in the Corps!
achievements.description: Defeat the mid-boss of Stage 2 - Factory and reach the sewers
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: You're Dog Meat, Pal!
achievements.description: Without taking any damage, defeat the mid-boss of Stage 2 - Factory
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Let's Rock!
achievements.description: Without taking any damage, complete the first APC driving level and the first half of Stage 2 - Factory up until (and including) the mid-boss
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: There's Something Moving and It Ain't Us!
achievements.description: On a 1 Credit Run, defeat the mid-boss of Stage 2 - Factory
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: They're Coming Out the Goddamn Walls!
achievements.description: Complete Stage 2 - Factory by defeating the final boss
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Looks Like a Goddam Town Meeting
achievements.description: Without dying, defeat the final boss of Stage 2 - Factory
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: I Got Readings in Front and Behind!
achievements.description: Without dying, complete the second half of Stage 2 - Factory, from just after the mid-boss fight until defeating the final boss
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Jesus, They Were Wall-to-Wall in There!
achievements.description: On a 1 Credit Run, defeat the final boss of Stage 2 - Factory
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Hold On, Newt!
achievements.description: Without dying, complete the second APC driving level
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: They Mostly Come at Night... Mostly
achievements.description: Complete the first half of Stage 3 - Factory2, including defeating the two mid-bosses and reaching the ladder
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: One Hell of a Hangover
achievements.description: Without dying, complete the sewers segment of Stage 3 - Factory2, from the second mid-boss fight up until reaching the ladder
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: These Things Ain't Ants, Estupido
achievements.description: On a 1 Credit Run, complete the first half of Stage 3 - Factory2, including defeating the two mid-bosses and reaching the ladder
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: They're Dead, All Right? Can I Go Now?
achievements.description: Complete Stage 3 - Factory2 by defeating the final boss
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: You Don't See Them Fucking Each Other Over for a Goddamn Percent
achievements.description: Without dying, defeat the final boss of Stage 3 - Factory2
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Man, You Look Just like I Feel
achievements.description: Without dying, complete the second half of Stage 3 - Factory2, from the ladder climb until defeating the final boss
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: I Can Handle Myself
achievements.description: On a 1 Credit Run, complete Stage 3 - Factory2
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: It Must Be Something We Haven't Seen Yet
achievements.description: Complete Stage 4 - Queen Alien's DEN by defeating the Queen
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Hey, Maybe It's Like an Ant Hive
achievements.description: On a 1 Credit Run, complete Stage 4 - Queen Alien's DEN
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Punch It Bishop
achievements.description: Complete Stage 5 - Escape Route by making it to the UD-4L "Cheyenne" Utility Dropship
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Bishop, You Did Okay
achievements.description: On a 1 Credit Run, complete Stage 5 - Escape Route
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Get Away from Her You Bitch!
achievements.description: Finish the game with the good ending by grabbing the queen with the P-5000 Loader and throwing her out of the airlock in Stage 6 - Battle Craft SULACO
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: P-5000 Power Loader Not Needed
achievements.description: Finish the game with the bad ending by killing the Queen in Stage 6 - Battle Craft SULACO
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: She's Badass, Man. I Mean Big
achievements.description: Without dying, kill the Queen in Stage 6 - Battle Craft SULACO
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Not Bad for a Human
achievements.description: On a 1 Credit Run, kill the Queen in Stage 6 - Battle Craft SULACO
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: She's Alive!
achievements.description: Gain an extra life
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: Let's Go, People. They Ain't Payin' Us by the Hour
achievements.description: Earn 50,000 points
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: They Ain't Payin' Us Enough for This, Man
achievements.description: Earn 100,000 points
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: They Can Bill Me
achievements.description: Earn 250,000 points
achievements.author: mopain85

achievements.title: I Am the Ultimate Badass! State of the Badass Army!
achievements.description: Earn 300,000 points
achievements.author: mopain85
